title: Toto Double or Nothing
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Marcello Marchesi, Vittorio Metz
plot: The Duke Gagliardo della Forcoletta, penniless and expert in horse-races, finds out he has a daughter, Emma Marini, who works in the bar Aurora. The Duke decides to participate in "Lascia o Raddoppia," a TV quiz transmission, in o...
